title: Sen's additions
description: Enhance Minecraft with stunning biomes, creative building blocks, survival depth, and performance that runs 350+ mods smoothly. Beautiful visuals, improved structures, voice chat, custom quests, and an official server await.
body:
# Sen's Additions
**Version 1.0.0 | Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric**

A vanilla+ modpack that enhances Minecraft with beautiful worldgen, quality of life improvements, and performance optimizations—without changing what makes the game great.

---

## 🌍 World Generation
Explore stunning landscapes with **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, and **Biomes O' Plenty**. Discover redesigned vanilla structures through YUNG's complete collection, plus new Nether and End content. **Distant Horizons** lets you see it all from miles away.

## ⚡ Performance
Runs smoothly with 350+ mods thanks to **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **ModernFix**. Optimized for both single-player and multiplayer with **ServerCore** and advanced rendering improvements.

## 🏗️ Building & Decoration
Thousands of new blocks through **Chipped**, **Macaw's** collection, **Handcrafted**, **Supplementaries**, and diagonal block variants. Build anything you can imagine with enhanced storage via **Storage Drawers** and **Extended Drawers**.

## 🍖 Survival & Adventure
- **Food:** Farmer's Delight, End's Delight, Crate Delight, Vinery
- **Combat:** Epic Knights armor & shields, Simply Swords, Advanced Netherite
- **Mobs:** Creeper Overhaul, Critters and Companions, Friends & Foes, Goblin Traders
- **Bosses:** Mutant Monsters, Illager Invasion, True Ending Dragon fight
- **Dimensions:** The Bumblezone, enhanced Nether & End

## 🎨 Visuals & Audio
**Dynamic lighting**, **connected textures**, **3D skins**, and **realistic animations**. Immersive audio with **Ambient Sounds**, **Sound Physics Remastered**, and **Presence Footsteps**. Beautiful weather effects and environmental details.

## 🛠️ Quality of Life
- **Maps:** Xaero's Minimap & World Map with FTB Chunks
- **Info:** AppleSkin, Jade, JEI, Better Statistics
- **Inventory:** Mouse Tweaks, Searchables, Visual Workbench
- **Voice Chat:** Simple Voice Chat with spatial audio
- **Quests:** Custom FTB Quests to guide you through features

---

## Server
An official server is available and pre-configured in your multiplayer menu. Join anytime to experience Sen's Additions with others!

## Requirements
- **Minimum:** 6GB RAM
- **Recommended:** 8-10GB RAM
- **Optimal:** 12GB+ RAM for Distant Horizons

---

**Created by SenNerd | [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sennerd)**
